top_signals.title: Bitcoin price may hit $24K if US stock market crashes by 50%, analyst warns
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin’s drop to $23,980 remains the worst-case scenario as weaker ETF flows and low US demand show big investors are still cautious.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Europe swelters under heat wave; France restricts alcohol consumption
top_signals.summary: Beyond the Alps, temperatures as high as 36-37C ​were transforming daily life and tourism in some Italian towns.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
